name: Information- Mushroom Stem Ideas
recipeInstructions:
1. Before freezing the mushroom stems, slice them and squeeze out excess liquid by rolling them in a clean napkin. Twist the napkin until all juice is drained into a bowl. Unroll the napkin to dry the stems before storing them in an airtight bag for up to 3 months.
2. Mash together finely chopped, sautéed mushroom stems with roasted garlic and serve as a pâté with bread crusts or under a steak just before serving.
3. Cook the stems with caramelized onions and incorporate into omelets.
4. Finely chop the stems for use in making vegetable stock.
5. Add diced stems to pre-made cream of mushroom soup.
6. Include diced stems in stuffing recipes.
7. Mix chopped stems with ground beef to add moisture and flavor to meatloaf and chili.
